EventDescriptions.EventDescription: The build with ID {object.process.id} is removed from a queue on host {event_src.host}
The build with ID {object.process.id} is canceled on host {event_src.host}
The build {object.process.fullpath} with number #{object.value} is removed on host {event_src.host}
The build with ID {object.process.id} is added to a queue on host {event_src.host}
